title: 王子杰逝世：创办丝芭、久游网，引进《劲舞团》
content: 王子杰, founder of Jiuyou Network and Silaba Media, died at 63 in Shanghai. He pioneered China’s gaming industry by importing Korea’s《劲舞团》 (Jin Dance), which made Jiuyou a major player but also locked it into a single‑product dependency that led to decline when the game aged. In 2012 he shifted to entertainment, creating SNH48 under Silaba Media and adapting Japan’s AKB48 idol model, building a successful fan‑economy system. His career illustrates the shift from imported licensing to domestic innovation and the risks of overreliance on one hit.

title: 腾讯开源混元 3D 世界模型 2.0
content: Tencent has released and open‑sourced HY‑World 2.0, a multimodal 3‑D world model that lets users generate complete, traversable worlds from text, images, or video. It produces editable 3‑D assets (mesh, 3DGS, point cloud) that can be exported to Unity, Unreal, and simulation engines. The system supports custom styles, realistic physics, and reconstruction of real‑world scenes into digital twins. Its improved architecture enables high‑quality, realistic, and seamlessly integrated 3‑D spaces for game and simulation development.

title: Claude 要求部分用户上传身份证件
content: Anthropic announced on April 14 that users accessing certain Claude features will need identity verification. The check, performed with Persona Identities, requires a valid, photo‑bearing government ID, a webcam, and a few minutes of time. Copies or non‑original documents are not accepted. Verification is intended solely to confirm identity for security and compliance; the data are not used for training, nor shared beyond legal obligations. Accounts can still be disabled for policy violations or other issues.

title: 字节启动新一轮期权回购
content: ByteDance has announced a new round of employee share buybacks. Active employees can purchase shares at $229.50 each (≈¥1,588), while former employees are offered $201.96 each (≈¥1,397). title: 阿里 HappyHorse 4 月 30 日开放 API
content: Alibaba’s HappyHorse 4.0 video‑generation AI, developed in its ATH innovation division, is being released on April 30. The 150‑billion‑parameter, single‑stream, 40‑layer Transformer model, built on the Arena.ai platform, can generate synchronized audio‑video content and lip‑sync in seven languages. It previously dominated blind‑test leaderboards for text‑to‑video and image‑to‑video on authoritative AI platforms, outperforming competitors like ByteDance’s Seedance 2.0 and Kuaishou’s KeLi‑3.0.

content: AI-assisted cognition, while promising, poses risks to human development by potentially overriding natural learning, critical thinking, and decision-making processes. content: Best of RS is a full‑stack web project written in Rust that tracks Rust open‑source trends. title: Do you even need a database?
content: The article questions whether an application truly requires a database. It explores alternatives such as in-memory storage, flat files, and cloud-based key‑value stores, weighing their pros and cons. The discussion highlights scenarios where a database may be overkill—small projects, prototyping, or when performance constraints are minimal—and contrasts them with cases where structured, scalable data handling is essential. The piece concludes that careful evaluation of data needs and future growth should guide the choice.

title: Hermes Agent抄袭中国团队代码实锤！被锤后回应：你删号 | 原文
content: Hermes Agent, a high‑starred GitHub project from Nous Research, allegedly copied the entire architecture of the Chinese open‑source engine EvoMap (Evolver). The copied components include a 10‑step loop with identical structure, though renamed, and the original team’s work was omitted from seven released documents. After criticism, the developers responded dismissively, telling critics to “delete your account.” The incident has sparked controversy over open‑source plagiarism in the AI community.
